author: ivy
name: Bloodvine Whalebuffet
bootlegger: On the 1st night, all players choose a character (of their assigned character type) to become.
The Demon is woken up first.
Minions may choose characters with the setup ability "[Might be a Minion]".
If there is more than 1 of the same character, 1 or more of the extras might be drunk.
The Storyteller may offer you the chance to reconsider if they think your choice will be unfun for you or others. Evil learns which character(s) this happened for.

name: Choose a Townsfolk
ability: On the 1st night, choose a Townsfolk character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Townsfolk player chooses a character.

name: Spotter
ability: You start knowing who has the Lethargic's crab. [+the Lethargic]
flavor: Seventeen years as an elite sniper for the Commonwealth and THIS is how I'm putting my skills to use? (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: Point to the player with the Has Crab reminder.

name: Thespian
ability: Each night, choose if evil abilities choose you instead until dusk.
flavor: Show yourself to the masses, for you are the world's entertainment and the world is your audience. Give it your all, do not slow down, and take a deep breath. You were always meant to be here. (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.
otherNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.

name: Glassblower
ability: Each night, learn the length of a line of players of the same alignment.
firstNightReminder: Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: Give a finger signal.

name: Baker
ability: Each night, learn how many steps (+ or - 1 step) an evil player is from you.
firstNightReminder: Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: Give a finger signal.

name: Observer
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how many reminder tokens are on them.
flavor: Alright, you, a little to the left, and you, shoulders back. Okay, now everyone, say cheese! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.

name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor (you don't know which) until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap the Arctic Fox's character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap the Arctic Fox's character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow ability doesn't see the grimoire.

name: Skulker
ability: Each night, choose a player: until dusk, if you die & they are not the Demon, swap characters with them & they die instead.
flavor: You say you don't want me, but then you look for me. You push me under the belly, but then you wonder why I am quiet. You build walls around me, but then you ask "Can't you climb?" Then you call for me, and I am here. (v1.4)
firstNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:

name: Speaker
ability: Each night*, choose a dead player: learn how they died.
flavor: I am that who speaks for the burried, preaching of their woes and failures to the breathing. I am that who speaks for the breathing, preaching of their desperation and laughter to the burried. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Speaker points to a dead player. Show the player's death reminder.

name: Pickler
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they are evil, you die.
flavor: Leave anything in vinegar for long enough and its true potential will always be brung out. Things never had to be this way. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The Pickler chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Loose
ability: Each night*, choose to register as dead until dusk. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: The life after your life is another life. The ghosts of your loved ones are ghosts in name alone. Here, there is no start and there is no end. I am tired, I want an end, I want this time to be different. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Loose either nods or shakes their head. :reminder:

name: Naturalist
ability: Each night*, if no-one died today, learn a player's character & how many steps they are from you.
flavor: The leaves cry over their lanterns' golden glow. The lanterns sit on their stools, watching over the brickwork. Life is as it should be. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: If no one died today, show a player's character token & give a finger signal.

name: Cheerleader
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: until dusk, their ability works twice.
flavor: BE OPPRESSIVE, B, E, OPPRESSIVE!! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:

name: Shoe Shiner
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: a chosen good player swaps characters with you & is then drunk.
flavor: What you wear on the outside reflects who you are on the inside, so if your outside is covered in dirt and grime, I'll assume you have a grimy soul! Why have a grimy soul when you can have a shining soul? (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder: :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Wrangler
ability: Once per game, at night, guess which Outsider characters are in play: if correct, they are drunk, even if you are dead. [+0 or +1 Outsider]
flavor: You need to be one with them; breathe the air they breathe, feel the wind they feel, feel next season's harvest under your hooves. Tread carefully and make sure to never ride with cowards. (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: The Wrangler might guess any amount of Outsider characters. :reminder: ?:reminder:s
otherNightReminder: The Wrangler might guess any amount of Outsider characters. :reminder: ?:reminder:s

jinxes.reason: If the Flail is drunk from the Wrangler's ability, the Flail loses their ability.

name: Taxidermist
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: they are reincarnated as a Dummy.
flavor: The life after this fella's life will be another life, full of watching and staring. Isn't that wonderful? Just, please, remember not to do anything weird in front of it. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The Taxidermist might choose a dead player. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Vet
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: if they are of opposing alignment (& not the Demon), they become a Vet.
flavor: This is mechanically impossible! It-it's a scientific breakthrough! How could something so small and feeble scale such a great height? (v1.2)
otherNightReminder: The Vet might choose a player. If they chose an opposing player, replace the target's token with a Vet token. Put the Vet to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* and Vet tokens. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: If the Epidemic is in play, an evil player may become a Vet due to the Vet's ability.
A Moonlit may become a Vet due to the Vet's ability.

name: Poet
ability: Once per game, during the day, publicly claim to be the Poet: the Demon is drunk until dawn.
flavor: A poet who never knows it certainly doesn't owe it to show it how far they can throw it. They may dip their toes in the riverbed, before throwing their greens into a piano's strings. "I was never the brightest tool in the shed", she pled as she bled, closer than ever to dead, no light further ahead. (v1.1)

name: Maid
ability: Once per game, during the day, publicly choose a dead player: if they are of opposing alignment, all players know this.

name: Celibate
ability: Once per game, the Storyteller will break a game rule to help your team win, even if you are dead. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: It is for you, my child, for who which is pure and holy and made of all good things. Your faith has, certainly, paid off. Your childrens' lungs will fill with gold's breath. (v1.1)

name: Boiled
ability: You may call for the exile of non-Travellers. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: Was it something I said? (v1.0)

name: Lovebug
ability: You & a Minion, if they live, are mad as the Minion's character, or you or they might be executed.
firstNightReminder: Show the Minion character token marked *MAD*. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Lovebug character token to the Minion.

name: Secretary
ability: If you died today or tonight, guess your alive neighbors' alignments: if correct, you live.
flavor: Sir, your 23:59:59.001 appointment is here. (v1.5)
otherNightReminder: If the Secretary died today or tonight, they point to 2 players & gives 2 thumbs up or down.

name: Pitied
ability: If you are the last living good player, good wins.
flavor: If things are going to continue to suck THIS badly, God eventually will look down on me and spare me some grace eventually, right...? (v1.1)

name: Lover
ability: If a player agrees, they are bound to you. You wake when they wake. If you die, they die, & vice versa.
flavor: Lover, lover, for whom do you call? For a man neither wide nor tall? If he asks for your hand, give him a cloth. If he asks for your light, give him a moth. If he asks for your heart, tell him off. (v1.0)

name: Baton Twirler
ability: The 1st time you die to evil, you live but register as dead. If you are then executed & more than 3 players live, your team wins. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: I spin then you spin then I spin then you- aw come on, you dropped it! You ruined it! You ruined everything! (v1.0)

name: Centrist
ability: 2 opposing players' votes count as 2 votes.
flavor: [insert interesting, humorous, and informative commentary on why centrist political views are right wing views with a coat of pastel pink paint] (v1.1)

name: Lethargic
ability: 1 player has your crab. If you guess (once) who it is, you can't die.
flavor: I can never sleep without Mr. Claws!! Can you please, sir, help me find him? (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: Wake the player with the Has Crab reminder. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token then the Lethargic token.

name: Choose an Outsider
ability: On the 1st night, choose an Outsider character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Outsider player chooses a character.

name: Desperate
ability: You are evil if at least one reminder token is on you. If not, you are good.
flavor: All I have ever wanted was to be noticed; for someone to give even a single damn about me. It should never have had to come to this. It never would have come to this if you, or anyone for that matter!, truly loved me. (v1.1) (token by Diamondwar)

name: Bookkeeper
ability: You can't speak the group's primary language, or might be executed.

name: Imaginary Friend
ability: You don't register as a player. [You want to be the Imaginary Friend the most]
flavor: Do you see it, above you? Reach for it; push your hand into the deep. Feel for it; it is wet and it cuts you and like silver it slivers. Grasp it, no matter how much it shimmers. Cut it like it cut you. (v1.2)

name: Flail
ability: If it isn't the 1st night & you are drunk or poisoned, your good neighbors die.
flavor: A child, set fit to glide high and fly, will always ultimately die to riptide. Like a storm rolling over the valley, its thunder striking the tree, one mother's sweet baby boy might get pulled under, forever lost to the sea. (v1.1)

name: Kruger
ability: All Townsfolk abilities yield false info.
flavor: make the flavor text a reference to reverse transmission (v1.0)

name: Crimson Sister
ability: The 1st time a Minion dies, they live but register as dead. The 1st time you die, you don't.
flavor: Nurture always wins over nature. No one chooses where they come from, they only choose who they become. I will do anything to sever myself from my heritage. (v1.3)

name: Bad Apple
ability: [1 to ? Outsiders are evil]

name: Playwright
ability: Abilities act in seat order, even if dead.

name: Choose a Minion
ability: On the 1st night, choose a Minion character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Minion player chooses a character.

name: Bloodletter
ability: Each night, players that choose you with their ability die.
flavor: Trust me, you don't need it as much as I do. (v1.0)

name: Hypnotist
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a character & alignment they think they become.
flavor: Five, three, four, two, zero, one. Three, five, two, four, one, zero. It is 11:59 PM. Now, it is 12:00 AM. (v1.2)
otherNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character & alignment. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token & the chosen alignment.

name: Hoary Zorro
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they register as the evil Hoary Zorro, even if you are dead.
firstNightReminder: The Hoary Zorro might point to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Hoary Zorro might point to a player. :reminder:

name: Gorge
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: they are regurgitated.
flavor: The blood of our ancestors fuel the blood of our children and the blood of our children fuel the blood of our fathers and the blood of our fathers fuel the blood of our friends and the blood of our friends fuel the blood of our enemies. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The Gorge might choose a dead player. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Cyclast
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose X players: they might die. If your team wins in the next X-1 days, your team loses, even if you are dead.
flavor: Over and over you show her how to fall to the floor to crawl, showing what is yours to all, doing what no one has the gall to call no version of love and no version of life, that which we lead and that which we fight, which is always quite a sight on this starless night of ours, looking up from the surface of Mars, going as far as the eye can see, far beyond this big, huge, sea of tar on the surface of Mars. (v1.3)
otherNightReminder: The Cyclast might choose X players. :reminder: X-1:reminder:s

name: Tardigrade
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player: you register as their character & alignment, even if dead.
firstNightReminder: The Tardigrade points to a player. :reminder:

name: Worm
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose 2 players: whatever happens to one also happenes to the other.
flavor: Ever since then, I've been able to see things I couldn't before; feel things I could've never imagined. It doesn't feel... good, nor is it painful either; it's something different. I'm not sure why, but I haven't been able to stop crying. (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Worm needs. :reminder: :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Alchemist-Worm doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Worm ability doesn't see the grimoire.

name: Bait
ability: When nominated by a good player, the nominator is poisoned.
flavor: Beware of the riverside! I hear of a great fish that lurks among the bank; they say it comes from the back of the moon. Its scales shiver with fever and its air is moonlight. (v1.2)

name: Window
ability: If the Demon kills you, choose a character: they die instead. If they are not in play, the Storyteller chooses who dies.
flavor: Look into me and you will see your mother's bedroom. Look out of me and you will see your closet. Look through me and you will see nothing but yourself. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Window chooses a character. :reminder:

name: Ectoplastic
ability: All players register as alive, keep their eyes closed when voting, & the vote tally is secret.
flavor: The Ectoplastic pulses. The Ectoplastic shines. The Ectoplastic throbs. The Ectoplastic grovels. The Ectoplastic is here. (v2.0)

name: Dealer
ability: The 1st time you are nominated by a good player, the nominator becomes evil.

name: Choose a Demon
ability: On the 1st night, choose a Demon character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Demon player chooses a character.

name: Shef
ability: Each night, choose a player: the previously chosen player dies. If you die & more than 3 players live, the previously chosen player becomes an evil Shef. [No Minions]
flavor: DOWNLOAD NOW!!! AWESOME BLOOD ON THE CLOCKTOWER (FREE!) FREE --- CLICK HERE --- FREE DOWNLOAD NO VIRUS PLAY NOW!!! (v2.2)
firstNightReminder: The Shef chooses a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Shef chooses a player. :reminder: The previously chosen player dies. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: The Pit-Hag can't create a Shef.

name: Killer Fish
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You have the ability of your recently killed player.
flavor: "Killer fish. Killer fish from San Diego. I don't know what I am, but I taste really good. I make killer fish. Hello. I'll be your killer fish for the evening. Thank you." (v1.2)
otherNightReminder: The Killer Fish chooses a player. :reminder: :reminder:

jinxes.reason: If the Killer Fish kills the Poppy Grower, Minions and Demons don't learn each other, but they do when the Killer Fish loses the Poppy Grower's ability.

name: Them
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [Half of players are evil. Evil are in a line. No Minions]
flavor: They are the calm. They are the storm. They are the wire that binds us all. Their sweat gives us life. We breathe so They can bleed. Your skin peels and under that skin you'll find Them. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: They choose a player. :reminder:

name: efwrvgpomij vgewo;jim
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you were nominated today, you may choose 2 players tonight.
flavor: wcegrpohijm sdgfpoji d gfpmsjlkrgjoiw  rstpoijw[oiep jr g rdoj;ijpoi  jpv hmoite sgdpfjio, (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The efwrvgpomij vgewo;jim chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Waste
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a good character (different to last night) they become. The previously chosen character dies.
flavor: It was soon after the skyscrapers melted that the Waste arose. It was soon after the sky fell that the Waste awoke. It was soon after the pets became monsters and the people became horrors that the Waste shined its brightest. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Waste chooses a player & a character. Put the Waste to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token. :reminder: The previously chosen character dies. :reminder:

name: { color: #000000 }
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they may no longer sit in their seat & a player dies. Substitutes don't learn their game state.
flavor: I am no Atheist; I know God is real, I know he is a liar, and I even know where he is. Deeper. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The { color: #000000 } chooses a player. Mark the target's seat with their name then vacate their seat. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Seed
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions & Demons do not know each other. If no Outsiders & Minions live, evil wins. [+2 Outsiders]
flavor: F7a99ed: [t]he mac41na[t]10n. M3china[t]i0n. Si9h[t]s abound. |>rif[t] [t]h20ugh [t]he soun|>. R#212t [t]emp[t]a[t]10n. D##per. (v1.3) (token by Diamondwar)
firstNightReminder: Skip Minion Info and Demon Info. Wake the Demon. Show the *THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY* token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.
otherNightReminder: The Seed chooses a player. :reminder:

name: Soul
ability: Each night*, the Soul may choose what alive player holds the Soul & "is the Demon". The Soul is evil until the player they chose chooses a player. [No Minions]
flavor: YUCK!! Why is it so slimy?! (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: Give the player marked *HEALING* a thumbs-up. The Soul chooses a player. :reminder: :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Soul tokens & give a thumbs-down.

name: Moonlit
ability: You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not. Each night*, one of your alive neighbors might die. [Evil characters are Moonlit. +1 Outsider]
flavor: (v1.2) (token by EBK)
otherNightReminder: A player might die. :reminder:

name: ERROR
ability: You register as dead. All alive players die. Each night, choose 3 players: they are regurgitated & 1 is poisoned until dusk. Evil wins if & only if all players (except Travellers) live.
flavor: Deeper. Ravenswood's walls stand ten-thousand feet tall. Ravenswood's walls' walls stand ten-thousand feet more. Deeper. This time will be different. Deeper. (v2.7) (token by Diamondwar)
firstNightReminder: All live players die. ?:reminder:s The ERROR chooses 2 players. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The ERROR chooses 2 players. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:

jinxes.reason: If the ERROR is in play, the Loose starts "hidden".
If the ERROR is in play and two or less players are dead, the Vizier loses their ability.
If the ERROR regurgitates the Grandchild, the Grandmother is regurgitated too.
If the Monk is chosen by the ERROR, the Monk is poisoned until dawn.
If the ERROR regurgitates the King, the Choirboy learns the ERROR is one of two players.
If the ERROR is in play, the Goon has their ability even if dead.
If the ERROR is chosen by the Exorcist, they learn who the Exorcist is and don't wake tonight and the Exorcist is poisoned.
If the ERROR is in play, the Mayor's ability is "2 or less players are dead" instead. If the Mayor is chosen by the ERROR, another player might be regurgitated instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Scarlet Woman's ability is "3 or more players dead" instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Lunatic has their ability even if dead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Snake Charmer may choose a dead player. If the ERROR is chosen by the Snake Charmer, the new ERROR does not kill.
If an ERROR is summoned, the ERROR kills all but five players instead. The Summoner can summon a dead player into the ERROR.
If the Princess nominated and executed a player on their first day, the ERROR doesn't wake tonight.

If the ERROR is in play, the Pixie's ability is "You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk. If you were & are mad as this character & they are dead, you have their ability." and they have this ability even if dead.
If the ERROR is in play and the player chosen by the Witch nominates, they don't die and instead are poisoned and all players learn this.
If the ERROR is in play, the Lycanthrope instead chooses three dead players. If both are good, they are regurgitated, one is poisoned, and the ERROR doesn't wake tonight.
If the ERROR is in play and the Saint dies to execution, evil wins.
If the ERROR is in play and a Minion publicly guesses the Damsel (once), evil wins.

name: Epidemic
ability: Evil players "are the Demon". Each night, an alive fresh player chooses a player: they might become their alignment. If all alive players are the same alignment, their team wins. [No Minions. 1 player is evil]
flavor: YUCK!! Why am I so slimy?! (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: Wake an evil player & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
otherNightReminder: Wake an alive player that has yet to be woken to choose a player by the Epidemic's ability & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Maybe wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.

name: Choose a Traveller
ability: On the 1st night, choose a Traveller character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Traveller player chooses a character.

name: Dummy
ability: When you learn a player died, you may choose to die instead.
flavor: A dummy?! This is what peak male performance looks like! (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: If a player died, the Dummy was woken and the dead player was pointed to. The Dummy might have nodded to die instead. If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

name: Adultery
ability: If a 50% majority publicly accuses a player of adultery, they can't nominate nor vote.
